nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: In the style of Suiboku, minimal brushwork, negative space,  subtle camera zoom in of a Canadian granite cliff face at dawn, sparse snow on the upper ledges, a wet crack at upper-right-center of the rock face, deep snow on the ground, right side of frame opens to a dark quiet winter residential path with bare trees. Light snow falling,

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: In the style of Suiboku with minimal brush work, a painterly reveal uses wet ink to transition from a bare rock face to the emergence of a small blue icicle nub. Broad, watery grey ink washes sweep across the upper ledge, depositing a pale blue crystalline icicle that elongates slightly as the paint dries.
